title: Rules of default applicable except as specified
doc_html:
§1169. Rules of default applicable except as specified

            The provisions of the Civil Code concerning putting in default are applicable to renewable energy leases subject to the modifications in this Part.

            Acts 2023, No. 455, §1, eff. June 28, 2023.
doc_text:
§1169.  Rules of default applicable except as specified
The provisions of the Civil Code concerning putting in default are applicable to
renewable energy leases subject to the modifications in this Part.
Acts 2023, No. 455, §1, eff. June 28, 2023.
